'''bofafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:icastic|icastic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:icastic|icastic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| bofafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofafithi|bofafithi]] || [[word:bofafiji|bofafiji]] || [[word:bofafishi|bofafishi]] || [[word:bofafiki|bofafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofafuthuthu|bofafuthuthu]] || [[word:bofafujuju|bofafujuju]] || [[word:bofafushushu|bofafushushu]] || [[word:bofafukuku|bofafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofafuthu|bofafuthu]] || [[word:bofafuju|bofafuju]] || [[word:bofafushu|bofafushu]] || [[word:bofafuku|bofafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofafufthuf|bofafufthuf]] || [[word:bofafufjuf|bofafufjuf]] || [[word:bofafufshuf|bofafufshuf]] || [[word:bofafufkuf|bofafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofafethe|bofafethe]] || [[word:bofafeje|bofafeje]] || [[word:bofafeshe|bofafeshe]] || [[word:bofafeke|bofafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofafothotho|bofafothotho]] || [[word:bofafojojo|bofafojojo]] || [[word:bofafoshosho|bofafoshosho]] || [[word:bofafokoko|bofafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofafotho|bofafotho]] || [[word:bofafojo|bofafojo]] || [[word:bofafosho|bofafosho]] || [[word:bofafoko|bofafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofafofthof|bofafofthof]] || [[word:bofafofjof|bofafofjof]] || [[word:bofafofshof|bofafofshof]] || [[word:bofafofkof|bofafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfthÃŸf|bofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfjÃŸf|bofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfshÃŸf|bofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfkÃŸf|bofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|bofafÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|bofafÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|bofafÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|bofafÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfthÃŸf|bofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfjÃŸf|bofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfshÃŸf|bofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfkÃŸf|bofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfthÃŸf|bofafÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfjÃŸf|bofafÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfshÃŸf|bofafÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:bofafÃŸfkÃŸf|bofafÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bofafÃḊthÃḊ|bofafÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:bofafÃḊjÃḊ|bofafÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:bofafÃḊshÃḊ|bofafÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:bofafÃḊkÃḊ|bofafÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bofafathatha|bofafathatha]] || [[word:bofafajaja|bofafajaja]] || [[word:bofafashasha|bofafashasha]] || [[word:bofafakaka|bofafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bofafatha|bofafatha]] || [[word:bofafaja|bofafaja]] || [[word:bofafasha|bofafasha]] || [[word:bofafaka|bofafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bofafafthaf|bofafafthaf]] || [[word:bofafafjaf|bofafafjaf]] || [[word:bofafafshaf|bofafafshaf]] || [[word:bofafafkaf|bofafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:bofafasha|bofafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafshÃḋsha|bofafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafrosha|bofafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafmusha|bofafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafyasha|bofafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafnkshÃḋsha|gobofafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafnkrosha|gobofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafnkmusha|gobofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafnkyasha|gobofafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:bofafafasha|bofafafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafafshÃḋsha|bofafafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafafrosha|bofafafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafafmusha|bofafafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafafyasha|bofafafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafafnkshÃḋsha|gobofafafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafafnkrosha|gobofafafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafafnkmusha|gobofafafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafafnkyasha|gobofafafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:befÃḊfasha|befÃḊfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:befÃḊfshÃḋsha|befÃḊfshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:befÃḊfrosha|befÃḊfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:befÃḊfmusha|befÃḊfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:befÃḊfyasha|befÃḊfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobefÃḊfnkshÃḋsha|gobefÃḊfnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobefÃḊfnkrosha|gobefÃḊfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobefÃḊfnkmusha|gobefÃḊfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobefÃḊfnkyasha|gobefÃḊfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:bofafasha|bofafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:bofafshÃḋsha|bofafshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bofafrosha|bofafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bofafmusha|bofafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bofafyasha|bofafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobofafnkshÃḋsha|gobofafnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobofafnkrosha|gobofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobofafnkmusha|gobofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gobofafnkyasha|gobofafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
